appStore.title: Good Morning Sunshine Rise, Shine, Emoji Stickers
appStore.description:
When our friend Little Sunshine isn't making silly faces, mad faces, lol faces and glad faces, she's dressing up as vikings, pumpkins, leprechauns and more! We've had a blast making this cute and colorful collection of emoji and stickers! Have fun!

...and now, some tips from Eggroll Games to get the most out of stickers!
• Drag a sticker up to any message and drop.
• Use two fingers to scale and rotate!
• Stickers stick to images, gifs and stickers.
• To send a big sticker, tap it and press send.

“We believe in friction-free learning for kids of all ages and strive to build fun experiences with eye-popping visuals, professional narration, catchy music, and lots of positive encouragement.

Thank you for supporting us and making our vision come to life.

Have fun!!”

- Blake, Amanda, Mike & Urszula, Eggroll Games
